title: batch: ResultReference::to_value() uses expect() in production code
description: ResultReference::to_value() calls serde_json::to_value(self).expect() in a production code path, violating CLAUDE.md 'no expect() in production code'. Fix: replace with serde_json::json\!({resultOf: ..., name: ..., path: ...}) which cannot fail.
close_reason: Fixed: to_value() uses json! macro, call_batch() detects duplicate call_ids, new() docstring updated
